title: Västerås Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Västerås, with a Z-Score of -3.49. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Västerås are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and daily life. 
 The HDD value of 13.2 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate a high demand for heating energy. 
 The relative humidity of 62% and wind speed of 10.8 km/h are also contributing to the harsh weather conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
